proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 440
; PROVEN: 0 <= totalUnverified <= contracts.length
; Each contract contributes at most 1 to totalUnverified (boolean increment)
(declare-const contracts_length Int)
(declare-const total_unverified Int)
(declare-const increment_count Int)  ; number of contracts where isUnverified = true
; Code transition: contracts_length > 0 (guard passed)
(assert (> contracts_length 0))
; Code transition: each loop iteration contributes 0 or 1 to totalUnverified
; so increment_count is bounded by the number of iterations
(assert (>= increment_count 0))
(assert (<= increment_count contracts_length))
; Code transition: totalUnverified = increment_count
(assert (= total_unverified increment_count))
; Negated property: total_unverified > contracts_length
(assert (> total_unverified contracts_length))
(check-sat)
